prompt: Create a front-facing collectible artwork of an original anime girl sealed inside a thick transparent glass block, like a luxury paper-craft shadow box. The glass case is a vertical rounded rectangle with very thick clear edges, polished bevels, refracted highlights, subtle bubbles and lens distortions, sitting on a glossy reflective tabletop with warm blurred indoor bokeh in the background. Inside the glass, make a highly detailed multi-layer paper-cut diorama that looks almost like a flat illustration from the front but reveals stacked paper depth in the flowers, frame, character, and background. The subject is Luminaria, a delicate young anime girl with pale blush pink long flowing hair, large sparkling blue eyes, a soft surprised expression, and fair skin. She wears an elegant white and powder-blue frilled dress with lace, layered ruffles, floral appliqués, puff sleeves, gloves, and a wide brim straw-style hat decorated with white and blue flowers. She holds a small silver flute or wand-like instrument in one hand. Surround her with exactly 4 main paper-craft layers: a deep blue sky and distant mountain background with clouds, an arched decorative white lattice frame, the central girl figure, and a foreground cluster of cut-paper flowers and leaves. Include exactly 3 hanging crystal ornaments near the upper arch, exactly 2 prominent large blue flowers at the lower left, exactly 3 prominent white flowers on the lower right foreground, and many smaller white blossoms and vines climbing both sides. Use a soft palette of powder blue, ivory, white, pale gold, and transparent glass. Add a small cream-and-gold nameplate centered at the bottom inside the frame with the text Luminaria in elegant cursive. Lighting should be premium product photography: bright rim highlights on glass, caustic reflections, shallow depth of field, crisp paper edges, delicate shadows between layers, ultra detailed, cute, elegant, magical, no extra text, no watermark.
